hero.tagline:
Engaging Minds
Mending Hearts
Empowering Hands

brands.title: Our Initiatives
brands.subtitle: Five distinct yet connected branches of one intellectual, spiritual, and communal ecosystem.

credologos.name: Credologos
credologos.description: Exploring the intersection of theology, philosophy, and science — equipping believers with thoughtful answers to life's deepest questions.

thirdSpace.name: Third Space
thirdSpace.description: A welcoming community space where people gather to share, listen, and belong — not driven by business, but by genuine human connection and care.

east.name: EAST
east.tagline: Theology. Society. Ministry in the Marketplace.
east.description: The Egyptian Academy for Society and Theology (EAST) offers online and in-person courses, certificates, and a master's program in ministry in the marketplace — equipping Christians to be a faithful presence in their professional spheres.

counseling.name: ICCP
counseling.description: The Institute of Clinical Counseling and Psychology — equipping practitioners with the tools to bring healing, hope, and transformation to individuals and families through professional Christian counseling education.

e30.name: E30
e30.description: A platform for Christian entrepreneurs and business leaders — integrating faith principles into bold, kingdom-driven enterprise and professional excellence.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Conferences, workshops, and courses to help you grow.

about.title: About AECC
about.subtitle: A place where truth is explored thoughtfully and beautifully.
about.visionText: AECC exists to create spaces — intellectual, communal, and cultural — where people can wrestle with the big questions and find that faith, reason, and beauty are not at odds.
about.missionText: Through five distinct initiatives, we serve thinkers and seekers in the Arab world and beyond, offering courses, events, and conversations that honor both the mind and the heart.

booking.title: Book Your Spot
booking.loginRequired: Please log in to book this event.
booking.successMsg: You're registered. Check your email for details.
booking.failureMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: A place where truth is explored thoughtfully.
